scripts.build:dev: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w deedlit.dev
scripts.build:comfyhelper: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w deedlit.dev.comfyhelper
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w deedlit.dev && npm run build -w deedlit.dev.comfyhelper
scripts.dev:vision: uv run --directory deedlit.vision opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.vision --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload --reload-include=app.py --reload-include=id_scheme.py --reload-exclude=*.py
scripts.dev:catalog: uv run --directory deedlit.catalog opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.catalog --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload
scripts.dev:search: uv run --directory deedlit.search opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.search --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8002 --reload
scripts.dev:graph: uv run --directory deedlit.graph opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.graph --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8003 --reload
scripts.dev:ingest: uv run --directory deedlit.ingest opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.ingest --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8004 --reload
scripts.dev:metadata: uv run --directory deedlit.metadata opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.metadata --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8005 --reload
scripts.dev:api: uv run --directory deedlit.api opentelemetry-instrument --service_name deedlit.api --traces_exporter otlp --metrics_exporter none --logs_exporter none --exporter_otlp_endpoint http://localhost:4318 --exporter_otlp_protocol http/protobuf uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --reload
scripts.predev: npm run infra:up && npm run dev:migrate
scripts.predev:services: npm run infra:up && npm run dev:migrate
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d --wait postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs tempo loki alloy grafana
scripts.infra:stop: docker compose stop postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs tempo loki alloy grafana
scripts.infra:restart: docker compose restart postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs tempo loki alloy grafana
scripts.infra:ps: docker compose ps postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs tempo loki alloy grafana
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs tempo loki alloy grafana
